tr.td: Alkaline phosphatase [Enzymatic activity/volume] in Serum or Plasma
Alanine aminotransferase [Enzymatic activity/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows elevated creatinine, suggesting impaired renal function, and mild hyperchloremia. Albumin is slightly high, while globulin is low, which may indicate altered protein balance. Triglycerides are mildly elevated. Other parameters, including glucose, electrolytes, liver enzymes, and cholesterol, are within normal limits. Renal function and protein abnormalities warrant further clinical correlation and monitoring.

display.value: Proteinuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Microalbuminuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Acute ST segment elevation myocardial infarction
Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus
